metadata.description: Vybe Plugins: skills, rules, agents, and MCP integrations for Vybe Desktop

plugins.name: teaching
plugins.description: Skill mapping, practice plans, and learning retrospectives.

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Incremental transcript-driven memory updates for AGENTS.md using high-signal bullet points only.

plugins.name: vybe-team-kit
plugins.description: Team workflows for CI, code review, and shipping.

plugins.name: create-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold and validate new Vybe plugins.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Iterative self-referential AI loops using the Ralph Wiggum technique.

plugins.name: agent-compatibility
plugins.description: CLI-backed repo compatibility scans plus agents that audit startup, validation, and docs against reality.

plugins.name: cli-for-agent
plugins.description: Patterns for designing CLIs that coding agents can run reliably: flags, help with examples, pipelines, errors, idempotency, dry-run.
